title: Double Digestion of Insert DNA
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: Combined enzyme volume should not exceed 1/10 of the total reaction volume. For double digestion with two FastDigest restriction enzymes, mix: %s %s PCR Purified 2016.07.25ng/uLGene DNA Tube X50ComponentVolume x2µl]Sterile MilliQ Water2410x FastDigest Buffer4PCR-amplified DNA8FastDigest Enzyme 12FastDigest Enzyme 22Total Volume40Total ng of DNA400 Total Volume can vary. Other components need to be adjusted.
Incubate at enzyme suitable conditions Find out suitable conditions on website of particular science company
Inactivate the enzyme at suitable conditions Find out suitable conditions on website of particular science company
Optional: Load on 1% agarose gel and run (duration and voltage vary)
